arts.ttl: Serie A | Parma v Atalanta: Probable starting lineups
arts.sum: Atalanta’s visit to Parma on Saturday evening could potentially see them climb to the top of the Serie A table, depending on results elsewhere. La Dea, currently part of a four-team cluster within a point of the league leaders, face a crucial test in their title aspirations. The match brings positive news for Gian Piero Gasperini’s side, with Italy international Giorgio Scalvini making a remarkable recovery. Just over five months after suffering an ACL rupture, Scalvini has been cleared to travel with the team, though his involvement in the match remains uncertain. arts.ttl: Sacchi: “Serie A is evolving. Inter and Atalanta ahead of Juventus”
arts.sum: The race for the Scudetto is heating up, with Inter and Atalanta attempting to leap to the top of the table, at least for one night, while Napoli awaits Roma’s visit tomorrow. Juventus also have an opportunity, but they face Milan at San Siro with several absences. Arrigo Sacchi, the renowned Italian football manager, shared his insights on the title chase and the evolution of Serie A in an interview with La Gazzetta dello Sport. Sacchi observed that this year’s championship is particularly unique, competitive, and engaging. He noted, “All teams, those at the top and even those at the The post Sacchi: “Serie A is evolving. Inter and Atalanta ahead of Juventus” appeared first on FootItalia.com.

arts.ttl: Manchester United eyeing Atalanta midfielder Ederson for January transfer window
arts.sum: Manchester United are preparing to make a strategic move in the upcoming January transfer window, with Atalanta midfielder Ederson emerging as a prime target for the club. Sky Sport Germany report that the 25-year-old Brazilian has caught the attention of new manager Ruben Amorim as he seeks to strengthen the team’s midfield options. Reports suggest that United are seriously considering Ederson, who has been a standout performer for Atalanta. The midfielder has been a consistent presence in the starting lineup, demonstrating versatility by playing in central and defensive midfield roles. arts.ttl: Atalanta chasing top spot in Parma
arts.sum: Atalanta have won each of their last six Serie A matches, while the only time they have had a longer run in the competition was between February and July 2020 (nine in that case) – among the teams in the Big-5 European Leagues this season, only Barcelona have had a run of seven straight wins. In Saturday’s 20:45 CET kick-off, Parma will be looking for three big points in the relegation fight when they face an Atalanta side who have won their last six matches
